title: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
notes: This event grants random cards. [gold]Study[/gold] adds a random Power card to your deck. [gold]Touch the Core[/gold] adds a random 0-cost card to your deck. After choosing an option, an encounter description is displayed before the event closes.
